content:
Our Botox treatments start from £200. Sessions are approximately 30 minutes and involve minimal downtime, with results appearing within 3 to 14 days.

If you'd like to find out exactly what's recommended for your specific concerns, we offer a free 20-minute initial consultation with no obligation. Would you like help booking one?
Do  you offer laser hair removal?

That's a great question! Laser hair removal isn't a service we currently have listed, so I wouldn't want to give you any inaccurate information. I'd recommend reaching out to our team directly so they can give you a definitive answer.

Would you like me to connect you with a member of our team? Alternatively, I'm happy to tell you more about the treatments we do offer, such as Botox or Dermal Fillers!

I'm really sorry to hear you're feeling this way, and I completely understand your frustration. I want to make sure you're properly taken care of, so I'm going to connect you with a member of our team right away who will be able to assist you further.

Someone will be with you shortly — thank you for your patience.

I completely understand, and I want to make sure you get the best help possible. I'm connecting you with one of our team members right now who will be able to assist you further. Please bear with us — someone will be in touch very shortly. 💙

I'd love to find out a bit more about you so we can tailor our service perfectly. I have just a few quick questions — it'll only take a moment!

Could you tell me what type of business or role you're enquiring for? (e.g., personal, clinic partner, influencer)
Roughly how many treatments or bookings would you be looking at per month?
Are you currently using any booking or CRM tools, or would this be your first time?
no this is my first time
Thank you so much — that's everything I need! I've noted your details and a member of our team will be in touch to discuss next steps. Is there anything else I can help you with in the meantime?
Thank you for reaching out, and I'm sorry again for any frustration caused. A member of our team will be in touch with you shortly to help resolve things. Take care, and have a lovely day! 😊
